title: Highlight duplicate items across different boards
excerpt: I would like to if duplicate items exist across various unique boards. If unique items are present (this could be based on one or any column values) I want to highlight that row on either both or one board. I would like …

posts.author: Stone (Stone)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to if duplicate items exist across various unique boards. If unique items are present (this could be based on one or any column values) I want to highlight that row on either both or one board. I would like to avoid the final step after a duplicate is found to be moving the duplicate to a new board or group.

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Stone,

Welcome to the community

You can use the Duplicates and Uniques app to achieve that. Here is a demo of how.

If you have any questions, you can always reach out at support@kolaai.com
